title: Position Paper on Licensing Approach to IP-Based Voice and Messaging Services
summary: Clarifies treatment of IP-based voice and messaging services under Bahrain’s telecom licensing framework.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.ott_digit: TRA position on IP voice and messaging licensing.
